nasb.text: As for you, you shall go to your fathers in peace; you will be buried at a good old age.

esv.text: As for you, you shall go to your fathers in peace; you shall be buried in a good old age.

cnv.text: 你必得享長壽，被人埋葬，平平安安地回到你列祖那裡。

ccb.text: 而你必享长寿，安然离世。

csbs.text: 至于你，你必平平安安地归到你的列祖那里，你必尽享天年，才被人埋葬。
